title: Backend: Fix oracle.ts clearAllData() to fully reset OracleCommittee
acceptance_criteria: clearAllData() replaces this.oracleCommittee with new OracleCommittee() instead of calling clearAllVotes()
New OracleCommittee constructor reinitializes all 3 members and empty votes map
Consistent with creditBureau and identityProvider which already use constructor reassignment
All 24 tests still pass (especially oracle voting and clearAllData tests)
